message.message: Part time solo attorneys are not eligible
Solo practitioners without backup are not eligible - review with management
Review additional information and determine how the additional location is managed - review with management
Attach the Office Sharing Exclusion

Review list of other entities - contact applicant to understand what services the entities are providing and that the services provided are defined as a legal service - review with management - referral to C & F required
Contact applicant to understand the nature of the work - review with management - referral to C & F required
Review the Public Figures supplement and review with management - referral to C & F required
Review with management
Review Environment Supplement - review with management - referral to C & F required
Review with management
Review Supplement and review with management - referral to C & F required
Review with management
Review Supplement and review with management
Review Supplement and review with management
Review with management
Review Supplement and review with management
Review description and contact applicant to understand the services described - review with management
Determine the stability of the relationship and the firm's ability to withstand loss of such a key client - review with management - referral to C & F required
Determine the extent of the equity interest and the nature of the enterprise - review with management - referral to C & F required
Review additional information - if depository institution or public entity - review with management - referral to C & F required
Contact Applicant to determine what process is in place - review with management
Review AOP's, contact client to get additional information if required - review with management
Contact Applicant to understand what type of engagement process is used - review with management
Contact Applicant to understand how investment in clients are handled - review with management
Contact Applicant to understand how client confidentiality is handled - review with management
Determine how long receivables have been at this level. Is this circumstance improving or getting worse? - review with management
Review number of fee suits - discuss with client - review with management - referral to C & F required if over 1
Review details - discuss with client if required - review with management
Review claims information - review UW guidelines provided by C & F - review with management - may be a referral to C & F
Review incident information - review UW guidelines provided by C & F - review with management
Review additional information provided - review with management
Contact Applicant to get the details on the lateral hires that are covered - review with management - referral to C & F required
Contact Applicant to get the details and copy of the exclusion - review with management
Determine details of merger: when, with whom, number of attorneys involved, nature of practices - review with management
Determine specific nature of services and how many times it occurred. - Review information with management
Determine nature and scope of activity - Review information with management
Discuss details with Applicant - Review information with management
Review case intake procedures: Issues include management of statutes of limitations, conflicts, clear communication of roles and responsibilities - review information with management
Discuss controls with applicant - review with management
Discuss controls with applicant - review with management
Review any provided additional information - review with management
Discuss details with Applicant - Review information with management
Review claims supplement - review with management
Determine nature and extent of services and applicants experience in such - Review information with management
Review with management - referral to C & F required
Determine nature and extent of services and applicants experience in such. - Review information with management
Determine nature and extent of services and applicants experience in such - Review information with management
Discuss details with Applicant - Review information with management
Discuss details with Applicant - Review information with management
Determine nature and extent of representation - Review with management
Discuss details with Applicant - Review information with management
Determine if there has been a lapse in coverage - review with management
At least one of the attorney's has to be licensed in the location state
Support staff ratio greater than 3 to 1 - review with management
Contact applicant to understand the change in revenue - review with management
Contact applicant to determine why the change in limit or why a solo needs the higher limit - review with management
Contact applicant to determine why the change in deductible or why a solo needs the higher deductible - review with management
Determine if there has been a lapse in coverage - review with management
Contact Applicant to determine if they have a prior acts date - get copy of declarations page of current policy
Contact Applicant to determine if they have a prior acts date - get copy of declarations page of current policy

PolicyEffectiveDateFrom should not be empty

Sucessfully Uploaded.
CANNOT SEND THE QUOTE FOR MORE THAN 45 DAYS OUT
CANNOT SEND THE QUOTE FOR MORE THAN 70 DAYS OUT
C & F is not allowing any increase in limit.
Policy data has been updated successfully
